name: make-ten-first-v2
_note: Math Island V2 'Make 10 First' (8+5). Images 1536x1024 (3:2) -> 16:9 fill. All fx coords in 1536x1024 SOURCE space; retune after generation. Ocean/island world, parchment/wooden sign cards, shell counters, island palette mint/teal #19c8b9, warm brown #794f27, cream #f8f8f0, coral-pink #f0607a.

scenes.narration: Welcome to Math Island! Here is a new puzzle. What is eight plus five?
scenes.prompt: Children's educational illustration, Math Island world, soft toy-like vector style, wide landscape 16:9. Radial ocean gradient cyan to turquoise with gentle wave lines, a rounded green island blob with a sandy beige clearing, palm trees, flowers, and a tiny lighthouse and hut landmarks framing the corners; sticker stars in upper corners. Hanging carved wooden title sign reading 'Math Island - Make 10 First'. Large parchment/wooden lesson card in the center reading '8 + 5 = ?' in warm brown rounded friendly font. On the sandy clearing: a group of eight blue shells on the left and a group of five coral-pink shells on the right, each shell glossy with a highlight. No answer shown. Palette mint/teal #19c8b9, warm brown #794f27, cream #f8f8f0, coral #f0607a. Crisp legible text, uncluttered center.

scenes.narration: Look at the eight shells. Eight only needs two more to make ten.
scenes.prompt: Same Math Island vector style, 16:9. Center stage shows a sandy ten-frame shaped like a rounded island path with TEN slots in two rows of five. Eight glossy blue shells fill the first eight slots; the last TWO slots are EMPTY golden glowing spots with soft sparkle hints. A small wooden sign above reads 'Eight needs 2 more'. Palms and flowers frame the edges, calm turquoise ocean behind. Palette mint/teal, warm brown, cream, gold. Crisp text, easy to count, uncluttered.

scenes.narration: We can split the five into two and three.
scenes.prompt: Same Math Island vector style, 16:9. The group of five coral-pink shells separates into a teal pair (2 shells) on the left and a coral trio (3 shells) on the right, with a small gap of sandy path between them. A carved wooden sign in the center reads '5 = 2 + 3' in warm brown. Gentle dotted lines connect the original five to the two new groups. Palms, flowers, ocean behind. Palette mint/teal, warm brown, cream, coral. Crisp legible text, easy to read.

scenes.narration: Move the two shells over to make a friendly ten. Make ten first!
scenes.prompt: Same Math Island vector style, 16:9. A teal pair of two shells travels along a curved dotted sandy path from the right toward the left ten-frame, with little footprint dots marking the path. The left ten-frame becomes a COMPLETE golden row of TEN shells in two rows of five, glowing with a sparkle burst and a mint-teal '10' badge. A bright caption ribbon banner reads 'Make 10 first!'. Three coral shells remain on the right. Palms and ocean behind. Palette mint/teal, warm brown, cream, gold, coral. Crisp text, uncluttered.

scenes.narration: Now it is easy. Ten plus three is thirteen!
scenes.prompt: Same Math Island vector style, 16:9. Joyful reveal on a big cozy parchment/wooden answer card: '10 + 3 = 13' with the '13' large and dominant in bright island coral pink-red. A golden ten-bundle with a '10' badge sits bottom-left and three coral shells bottom-right. A celebration star sticker and confetti accents around the card. Palms, flowers, sparkling ocean behind. Palette mint/teal, warm brown, cream, coral-pink #f0607a, gold. The 13 is the most dominant element. Crisp legible text.

scenes.narration: This trick works again and again. Nine plus six makes ten plus five, fifteen. Seven plus eight makes ten plus five, fifteen.
scenes.prompt: Same Math Island vector style, 16:9. Two mini activity cards side by side like island map stops, connected by a dotted footpath, each with a small landmark icon (left: a palm tree, right: a lighthouse). Left card big text '9 + 6 -> 10 + 5 = 15'. Right card big text '7 + 8 -> 10 + 5 = 15'. Each card is a rounded parchment/wooden sign with shell accents. Turquoise ocean and island behind. Palette mint/teal, warm brown, cream, coral. Crisp legible text, both cards equally clear.

scenes.narration: Now it is your turn. What is eight plus six?
scenes.prompt: Same Math Island vector style, 16:9. A big carved wooden challenge signboard reads 'Your turn: 8 + 6 = ?' in warm brown. Below it an island ten-frame with eight blue shells and two EMPTY glowing golden spots still visible, and six coral shells to the side. A large rounded question bubble with a soft '?' and a gentle pulse glow sits in the center. Palms, flowers, sticker stars, sparkling ocean behind. Palette mint/teal, warm brown, cream, coral, gold. Inviting and warm. Crisp legible text.
